title: Chatbot Faq
text: # AMA reference notes Short, retrieval-friendly blurbs for common visitor questions. Used when the portfolio chatbot is integrated (corpus build / sync). Not wired into the live site while chatbot UI is disabled. ## Contact and how to reach me If you want to reach me about roles, collaborations, or clarifications on my work, use the contact line on my resume: phone (+91) 9431730420, email rohitraj3552008@gmail.com, LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/in/rohit-raj-b50809104/, GitHub https://github.com/Rodney-Codes, and the live portfolio at https://rodney-codes.github.io/personal-info/. People often ask how to hire me or where to message me; those links and email are the fastest channels. ## Current role and day-to-day focus I am a Data Analyst at Masai (Bengaluru) from July 2024 to present. My work centers on analytics engineering style problems: automated pipelines, dashboards on Metabase, web scrapers, AWS-hosted jobs, and cross-team reporting so operations and marketing can see trends without manual spreadsheets. Questions like where I work now or what I do day-to-day should point here. ## Python, SQL, and analytics depth Visitors frequently ask how strong my Python or SQL is. I use Python and SQL end-to-end for ETL, automation, quality checks, and dashboard prep across pharma consulting (ZS Associates) and EdTech (Masai), roughly four years of professional analytics-heavy use plus academic foundations. I pair them with cloud databases, Metabase, Tableau-family tooling, and scripting for operational efficiency. ## Cloud, BI, and modern data stack I have hands-on experience provisioning and using AWS EC2 and Lightsail for databases and scheduled jobs, alongside Metabase, Power BI, Tableau, Redash, and ClickHouse in various stacks. If someone asks about AWS, BI tools, dashboards, or self-hosted analytics, this section grounds those answers in what I have actually shipped. ## Prior experience at ZS Associates From June 2021 to January 2024 I was a Decision Analytics Associate at ZS Associates in Gurgaon, working on oncology market research, conjoint and derived-importance studies, R-based modeling, Tableau and Excel automation, and client-facing analytics that supported large commercial decisions. Questions about consulting, pharma analytics, or ZS should align with this experience. ## Projects visitors often ask about Beyond employer work, I maintain an open-source style resume and portfolio builder (Markdown, Vite, Python PDF tooling) and shipped a lightweight portfolio AMA chatbot service with hybrid retrieval and grounded answers. If someone asks about side projects, GitHub activity, or the chatbot itself, combine this section with the dedicated project chunk in the resume JSON. ## Collaboration style and strengths I am strongest where product, operations, and data overlap: translating messy business questions into measurable metrics, automating recurring reporting, and documenting pipelines so others can run them. Questions about teamwork, stakeholder management, or how I like to work should map here together with my experience bullets.

title: Portfolio 2
text: --- photoProjectsDelivered: "30+" photoProjectsDeliveredDescription: "Successfully delivered analytics dashboards, ETL pipelines, and data visualization projects." --- ## Impact metrics 80% Faster Dashboards Improved Metabase dashboard load times by 80% through Python optimization at Masai School. 50M+ Daily Records Automated ETL pipelines processing millions of records daily across PostgreSQL and MongoDB databases. 20+ Production Pipelines Built and deployed ETL workflows across 2 organizations, handling critical business data flows. 30% Cost Savings Reduced cloud infrastructure costs through efficient data storage and processing strategies. 95% Tasks Automated Automated 95% of manual data collection and reporting tasks using Python scripts and scheduled jobs.

title: Resume 1
text: # Rohit Raj (+91) 9431730420 | [rohitraj3552008@gmail.com](mailto:rohitraj3552008@gmail.com) | [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/rohit-raj-b50809104/) | [GitHub](https://github.com/Rodney-Codes) | [Portfolio](https://rodney-codes.github.io/personal-info/) --- ## Professional Summary Experienced Data Analyst with 4+ years of expertise in building end-to-end ETL workflows, data modeling, and analysis within the Pharma consulting and EdTech domains. Proficient in SQL and Python, with experience in setting up databases on AWS EC2 and Lightsail servers. Skilled in data engineering and Google Analytics, with a proven track record of collaborating with cross-functional teams and clients to design and implement impactful data solutions. --- ## Professional Experience ### Data Analyst **Masai** | Bengaluru, Karnataka | Jul 2024 -- Present - Architected an automated pipeline for student placement recommendations, **reducing manual effort and cutting revenue-side costs by 60%** - Streamlined and automated revenue-metric dashboards to highlight recurring trends, **improving cost efficiency by 15% in business development operations** - Developed automated web scrapers for lead generation, **resulting in monthly savings of INR 1.2L** - Migrated pipelines to GitHub and AWS EC2 crons while spearheading comprehensive pipeline documentation - **Implemented weekly dashboards on Metabase** to track daily operations and marketing channels, migrating from spreadsheet-based reporting to enhance efficiency - Designed and deployed webhooks along supporting data architecture from several NBFC institutions for reconciliation, **reducing quarterly manual efforts by roughly 17%** - **Architected the core resume-job description matching engine** for an AI-native interview and hiring platform, **pairing structured extractions from resumes and role postings with LLM-based fit scores and confidence indices**, supporting a successful follow-on funding round - Delivered an automated document-generation workflow for digital admission letters and student identification cards, **reducing operations-team manual effort by 60%** ### Decision Analytics Associate **ZS Associates** | Gurgaon, Delhi NCR | Jun 2021 -- Jan 2024 - Led a 5-member team to analyze oncologists' **awareness and perceptions** of drug advertising materials, revamping sales marketing strategies and doubling market share - Applied **advanced market research methodologies** (e.g., derived importance, conjoint analysis) to drive a 2X increase in client drug market share, contributing $8M+ in top-line impact - **Developed automation tools** adopted ZS-wide, reducing project costs by 50% and effort by 80% while maintaining quality - Automated Excel processes using Python and SQL, reducing data quality check efforts by ~60% - **Led client discussions and pitches**, securing $1.5M+ in business and mentoring 25+ recruits on business understanding and tools - **Designed and updated dynamic Excel and Tableau dashboards** to present sales-force data, enabling informed decision-making - Optimized a marketing **statistical model in R** to predict ideal product profiles based on randomized parameters from 250+ HCPs - **Awarded "RecognizeZS"**, a distinction given to the top 1% of performers among 13K+ employees globally --- ## Projects **Resume and portfolio builder** | Markdown, Vite, Python PDF tooling | 2026 @repo https://github.com/Rodney-Codes/personal-info
